prompt_task: In deleterious.mutation.q2.R1.fq.gz (exome 1×150 bp, reads from human 50Mb chunk of chr9 only), there is one gene that harbors a high-confidence nonsense SNV consistent with somatic mosaicism. The gene is highly LoF-intolerant. Report the HGNC gene symbol (uppercase) for the affected gene, and the approximate alternate allele frequency, rounded to the nearest 10%. Expected output format: POU5F1,10. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
